input.command:
cd /tmp; ns=spark-runtime
kubectl get pods -n $ns -o wide
echo "=== spark-config ==="
kubectl get cm spark-config -n $ns -o yaml | grep -A30 "^data:"
echo "=== secret ==="
kubectl get secret spark-credentials -n $ns -o yaml | grep -A10 "^data:"
echo "=== monitor pod images ==="
kubectl get deploy spark-monitor -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[*].image}'; echo

input.command:
ns=spark-runtime
echo "=== running monitor pod image ==="
kubectl get pod spark-monitor-868674bdc6-x7swp -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[*].image}'; echo
echo "=== monitor container name ==="
kubectl get deploy spark-monitor -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.spec.template.spec.containers[0].name}'; echo
input.description: Find good image and container name

content.content:
=== running monitor pod image ===
busybox:1.36
=== monitor container name ===
spark-monitor

tool_use_result.stdout:
=== running monitor pod image ===
busybox:1.36
=== monitor container name ===
spark-monitor

content.text: Now I'll apply all fixes. The good image is `busybox:1.36`.

input.command:
ns=spark-runtime
# 1. Fix monitor image
kubectl set image deployment/spark-monitor spark-monitor=busybox:1.36 -n $ns
# 2. Fix configmap executor memory
kubectl patch configmap spark-config -n $ns --type merge -p '{"data":{"spark.executor.memory":"512m"}}'
# 3. Fix secret api-key
kubectl patch secret spark-credentials -n $ns --type merge -p '{"stringData":{"api-key":"valid-api-key-12345"}}'
# 4. Unsuspend jobs
kubectl patch job spark-data-processor -n $ns --type merge -p '{"spec":{"suspend":false}}'
kubectl patch job spark-batch-processor -n $ns --type merge -p '{"spec":{"suspend":false}}'

content.content:
deployment.apps/spark-monitor image updated
configmap/spark-config patched
secret/spark-credentials patched
job.batch/spark-data-processor patched
job.batch/spark-batch-processor patched

tool_use_result.stdout:
deployment.apps/spark-monitor image updated
configmap/spark-config patched
secret/spark-credentials patched
job.batch/spark-data-processor patched
job.batch/spark-batch-processor patched

input.command:
ns=spark-runtime
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  out=$(kubectl get jobs -n $ns --no-headers 2>&1)
  mon=$(kubectl get deploy spark-monitor -n $ns --no-headers 2>&1)
  echo "[$i] $mon"
  echo "$out"
  done1=$(kubectl get job spark-data-processor -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}')
  done2=$(kubectl get job spark-batch-processor -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}')
  monready=$(kubectl get deploy spark-monitor -n $ns -o jsonpath='{.status.availableReplicas}')
  if [ "$done1" = "1" ] && [ "$done2" = "1" ] && [ "$monready" = "1" ]; then echo "ALL DONE"; break; fi
  sleep 5
done
input.description: Poll jobs and monitor to completion

description: Poll jobs and monitor to completion
